mapper.select: SELECT * FROM indicator WHERE system_id = #{systemId} ORDER BY row_index
SELECT * FROM indicator WHERE system_id = #{systemId} AND dimension = #{dimension} ORDER BY row_index
SELECT DISTINCT dimension FROM indicator WHERE system_id = #{systemId}
SELECT DISTINCT category FROM indicator WHERE system_id = #{systemId} AND dimension = #{dimension}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO indicator (system_id, dimension, category, level1_name, level2_name, weight, unit, row_index) VALUES
(#{item.systemId}, #{item.dimension}, #{item.category}, #{item.level1Name}, #{item.level2Name}, #{item.weight}, #{item.unit}, #{item.rowIndex})
